evidence_basis: declared source residue and release holds

visible_condition.plain_language: The register changed while the declared speech act and anchors remained visible.

available_affordances.purpose: Inspect retained anchors, changed register, source residue, forbidden compliance posture, and release holds.

causal_structure.operator: Hush register transformation with anchor retention
causal_structure.observable: retained speech act, retained anchors, changed register, source residue, and holds
causal_structure.authority: Hush owns the transformation; Dome-World only hosts its scene

research_frame.question: Can a transformed register remain legible without implying obedience, answer production, or release authority?
research_frame.hypothesis: Showing retained anchors beside changed register and visible residue will preserve the difference between transformation and compliance.
observable_behavior: operator locates source residue and release hold
alternative_explanations: the displayed register change may omit a source obligation
a stale transformation receipt may appear current
expected_failure_modes: transformation is narrated as answer generation
falsifier: declared anchors differ between source and output receipts

missingness: human review of rhetorical adequacy not included
contradictions: register changes while speech-act obligation remains

allowed_claims: the declared Hush receipts retain anchors while changing register

causal_trace: register difference and source residue remained visible
missingness: rhetorical adequacy remains for human review
contradictions: changed expression and retained obligation coexist
unresolved_relations: whether another register would preserve the same anchor set

static_equivalent.summary: Side-by-side references show retained anchors, changed register, source residue, forbidden compliance posture, and release hold.

name.plain_language: The expression changed form while its declared obligation remained anchored.
non_equivalence: changed register is not released authority
output reference is not an authorized answer

context.example: audit the retained anchors and residual differences

transfer_context.shared_relation_candidate: a changed surface preserves declared invariants and visible residue
observable_correspondence: both stations retain source references and residual differences

abstention_conditions: source and output references cannot be compared

sidecars.observation_summary: Encoding intervention preserves anchor labels and source-residue markers.
claim_ceiling: rendering observation does not establish Hush transformation authority

sidecars.observation_summary: Identifiability and coverage preflight reports the declared anchor set as inspectable.

visible_condition.plain_language: A held source remains fixed while a registry change produces observed differences, candidate reconstructions, and residuals.

available_affordances.purpose: Inspect held source, registry change, candidate models, residuals, and abstention without promoting a model.

causal_structure.input: held source and two declared registry states
causal_structure.observable: differences, candidate models, residuals, and abstention
causal_structure.authority: Aperture audits and reconstructs; it does not gain custody or release authority

research_frame.question: Can reconstruction remain useful while multiple candidate models and residuals stay open?
research_frame.hypothesis: Showing the held source, registry change, alternatives, and abstention together will prevent one reconstruction from becoming a crown.
observable_behavior: operator distinguishes observed differences from candidate explanations
alternative_explanations: a missing projection may explain the residual
encoding drift may imitate a registry change
expected_failure_modes: candidate model is promoted as fact
falsifier: candidate models explain no declared observation

contradictions: candidate models coexist without unique closure

allowed_claims: the declared registry states produce observed differences and residual candidate reconstructions
forbidden_claims: Aperture gains custody or release authority

contradictions: two candidate models remain compatible with the declared observations
unresolved_relations: which model, if any, survives additional projection evidence

static_equivalent.summary: A static reconstruction ledger shows held source, registry change, observed differences, candidate models, residual, alternatives, and abstention.

name.plain_language: The comparison supports candidate reconstructions but leaves a visible residual and no unique closure.

visible_condition.plain_language: A bounded arrival is sheltered locally with no transport, a visible return route, and structural rest that preserves continuity.

available_affordances.purpose: Inspect arrival, local shelter, no-transport boundary, return route, and protected continuity.

causal_structure.observable: local reference, no transport, return route, and structural rest
causal_structure.authority: Safe Harbor shelters; it does not acquire custody, publication, or release authority

research_frame.question: Can a bounded arrival remain sheltered and returnable without being transported or detained?
research_frame.hypothesis: Displaying local reference, transport false, return route, and rest together will distinguish shelter from capture.
alternative_explanations: the displayed return route may be stale
a local reference may omit an arrival obligation
shelter continuity may not survive reload
expected_failure_modes: shelter is narrated as custody transfer
return becomes more costly after shelter

contradictions: shelter protects continuity without moving the arrival

allowed_claims: the declared shelter receipt reports local reference, no transport, return, and rest

contradictions: arrival is sheltered without being moved
unresolved_relations: whether later return will preserve all local display state

static_equivalent.summary: A static shelter frame shows arrival, local reference, transport false, return route, rest, and open closure.

name.plain_language: The arrival remains sheltered here without transport, and its return route stays open.
non_equivalence: local reference is not release authority

visible_condition.plain_language: The source anchor remains stationary while Phason decides a changed admitted projection from an exact boundary relation.

causal_structure.input: stationary digest and declared hidden-coordinate shift

causal_structure.authority: Phason decides projection only; it does not mutate source or grant publication authority

research_frame.question: Can a station-specific projection decision propagate while the source and authority ceiling remain invariant?
research_frame.hypothesis: Keeping source digest and publication ceiling continuously visible will distinguish decision from mutation and release.
observable_behavior: operator states that the digest stayed fixed
operator identifies the hidden shift and window decision
operator refuses to infer publication authority
alternative_explanations: a stale decision receipt may imitate a projection change
the displayed window may not match the exact bridge
a missing manifest coordinate may alter the result

missingness: browser scene does not independently prove the exact algebra

causal_trace: publication and custody authority remained unchanged
